children.heading: Financial assistance for employee wages, salaries, and benefits
children.label: a Financial assistance for employee wages, salaries, and benefits

children.text: passenger air carriers, in an aggregate amount up to $15,000,000,000; and
contractors, in an aggregate amount up to $1,000,000,000.

children.heading: Administrative expenses
children.label: b Administrative expenses
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the Secretary may use funds made available under for costs and administrative expenses associated with providing financial assistance under this part.section 9072(b) of this title
